CONTENT.Personal life: Barcola's brother Bradley is also a professional footballer.
CONTENT.External links: Malcolm Barcola at SoccerwayMalcolm Barcola at National-Football-Teams.com
CONTENT.International career: Barcola made his Togo national team on 10 September 2019 in the second leg of the first round of 2022 World Cup qualification against the Comoros. He kept a clean sheet as his country advanced to the next round.

SUMMARY: Malcolm Barcola (born 14 May 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper, most recently for Bosnian Premier League club Tuzla City. Born in France, he plays for the Togo national team.
